description: OOD robustness evaluation: Test q225 (TAM-CTL recovery loss) checkpoint on out-of-distribution matrices using TAM-CTL mining strategy.
notes: OOD evaluation on q225 checkpoint (TAM + recovery loss). Uses TAM-CTL mining with same hyperparameters as training. Evaluates on ood=true (ill-conditioned matrices: rank-1 perturbations, κ >> 1). For comparison with q230 baseline.
